support.title: Destek
support.subtitle: Yardım alın, cevap bulun veya destek talebi gönderin
support.trainingCentreDesc: Her özellik için adım adım rehberler
support.faq1A: Davetlerinizin ödediği her üyelikten %50 tekrarlayan komisyon kazanırsınız. 8 seviyeli kampanya ızgarasından (%40 doğrudan + %6,25 × 8 seviye) ve kurs satışlarından da kazanırsınız.
support.faq2A: Kampanya ızgarasının motorudur. Video izlediğinizde, diğer üyelerin kampanyalarına gerçek görüntülemeler sağlarsınız.
support.faq3A: Her seviyede 8 kademede 64 pozisyonlu ızgara vardır. Tamamlandığında (64 üye), sahibi $3.200'a kadar bonus alır ve yeni ızgara otomatik açılır.
support.faq4A: Çekimler Polygon blok zincirinde USDT ile yapılır. KYC doğrulaması (bir kez) ve 2FA gerekli. Minimum $10. Cüzdana gidin.
support.faq5A: Basic ($20/ay): davet komisyonları, ızgara, İzle ve Kazan, LinkHub, Link Tools, Marketing Suite. Pro ($35/ay) SuperPages, AI Funnels, otomatik yanıtlayıcı, CRM ve lead paneli ekler.
support.faq6A: Kişisel davet linkinizi paylaşın. Panelinizde bulabilir veya QR kodu oluşturabilirsiniz. Linkinizle kaydolan kişi doğrudan davetiniz olur.
support.subject: Konu

cryptoGuide.title: Kripto Cüzdan Rehberi
cryptoGuide.subtitle: Cüzdanınızı 5 dakikada kurun
cryptoGuide.heroDesc: SuperAdPro ödemeler ve komisyonlar için kripto para kullanır. Bu rehber yaklaşık 5 dakikada ücretsiz cüzdan kurmanıza yardımcı olur.
cryptoGuide.step1P1: MetaMask 100 milyondan fazla kişinin kullandığı ücretsiz bir kripto cüzdanıdır.
cryptoGuide.step1P2: metamask.io'ya gidip resmi uygulamayı indirin. Yeni cüzdan oluşturun ve 12 kelimelik kurtarma ifadesi alın.
cryptoGuide.step1Warning: 12 kelimelik ifadeyi kağıda yazıp güvenli yerde saklayın. Asla paylaşmayın.
cryptoGuide.step2P1: SuperAdPro, Polygon ağını kullanır — işlemler 1 sentten az, Ethereum'da $5-15.
cryptoGuide.step2P2: MetaMask'ta ağ menüsüne dokunup "Polygon Mainnet"i seçin.
cryptoGuide.step3P1: Cüzdan adresiniz banka hesap numarası gibidir — paylaşmak güvenlidir. "0x" ile başlar ve 42 karakterdir.
cryptoGuide.step3P2: Komisyon almak ve hesap ayarlarına eklemek için bu adres gerekli.
cryptoGuide.step3Tip: Hesap sayfanıza gidin ve adresi Kripto Cüzdan bölümüne yapıştırın.
cryptoGuide.step4P1: USDT (Tether) bir stablecoin'dir — değeri $1'da kalır. Üyelik ve kampanya seviyeleri için kullanılır.
cryptoGuide.step4P2: Binance, Kraken veya Coinbase'den USDT alın. MetaMask adresinize gönderin.
cryptoGuide.step4Warning: USDT gönderirken her zaman "Polygon" ağını seçin. Yanlış ağ fonlarınızı erişilemez yapabilir.
cryptoGuide.step4Tip: İşlem ücretleri için yaklaşık $0.50 POL (Polygon'un yerel tokeni) de gerekli.
cryptoGuide.step5P1: MetaMask cüzdanınız Polygon'da USDT ile kuruldu. Üyelik ödeyebilir ve komisyon alabilirsiniz.
cryptoGuide.step5P2: Hiçbir ödeme işlemcisi fonlarınızı donduramaz. Banka yok. Paranız, kontrolünüz.
cryptoGuide.securityDesc: Hiçbir işlemci fonlarınızı donduramaz. Komisyonlar doğrudan ödenir. Banka veya aracı yok.

createCampaign.campaignDetailsDesc: Paste a YouTube or Vimeo link. Members will watch your video and you'll see real engagement analytics.

createCampaign.pendingReview: Under review — will be live shortly.
createCampaign.pasteAndGoDesc: Just paste a YouTube or Vimeo link. We handle the rest — embedding, delivery, and analytics.
createCampaign.realViewsDesc: Members watch your full video. No bots, no fake engagement. Real people, real attention.
createCampaign.liveAnalyticsDesc: Track views delivered, completion rate, and campaign progress in real-time on your dashboard.

campaignAnalytics.title: Kampanya Analizi
campaignAnalytics.subtitle: Kampanya performansını takip edin
campaignAnalytics.heroDesc: Every view is a verified 30-second watch from an active SuperAdPro member
campaignAnalytics.noCampaignsDesc: Activate a Campaign Tier to start getting real views on your videos
campaignAnalytics.verifiedDesc: Every view on SuperAdPro is verified. Members must watch your video for a minimum of 30 seconds to complete their daily Watch to Earn quota. Views are logged with timestamps, duration, and unique viewer tracking. No bots, no fake views — only real people watching your content.

onboarding.bioPlaceholderFull: örn. Çevrimiçi gelir oluşturmaya yardımcı olan pazarlamacı...

platformTour.title: Platform Turu
platformTour.subtitle: SuperAdPro'nun sunduklarını keşfedin
platformTour.s1_desc: Burası ana üssünüz. Her giriş yaptığınızda buraya gelirsiniz. Tüm gelir akışlarındaki kazançlarınızı, ağ boyutunuzu ve referans linkinizi görebilirsiniz.
platformTour.s1_tip1: Referans linkiniz her zaman üstte görünür — kopyalayın ve her yerde paylaşın
platformTour.s1_tip2: 3 gelir kartı Üyelik, Creative Studio ve Kampanya kazançlarını gösterir
platformTour.s1_tip3: Hızlı Eylem kartları en önemli araçlara hızlı erişim sağlar
platformTour.s1_tip4: Bakiyeniz sağ üstte gösterilir — Cüzdanınıza gitmek için tıklayın
platformTour.s2_desc: SuperAdPro, ekip kurma ve platformu kullanma karşılığında sizi ödüllendiren birden fazla gelir akışına sahiptir. Basit prensip: üyeleri yönlendirin, ağınızı oluşturun ve etkinliklerinden komisyon kazanın.
platformTour.s2_tip1: Üyelik Referansları — referanslarınız aktif kaldığı sürece her ay %50 tekrarlayan (Basic başına $10, Pro başına $17,50) kazanın
platformTour.s2_tip2: Kampanya Seviyeleri — bir seviye etkinleştirin ($20–$1,000) ve 8×8 Gelir Izgarasının kilidini açın: %40 doğrudan + 8 seviye uni-level komisyon
platformTour.s2_tip3: Profit Nexus — referanslarınız Creative Studio kredi paketleri satın alır, 3×3 nexus'unuza girer. Her döngüde seviye komisyonları + tamamlama bonusları kazanın
platformTour.s2_tip4: Kurs Pazaryeri (yakında) — %100 komisyonla dijital kurslar satın ve sonsuz derinlikte kazanç yaratan pass-up sistemi
platformTour.s2_tip5: Etkileşimli hesap makineleri ve kazanç sorularını yanıtlayan AI asistanı için Ücret Planı sayfasını ziyaret edin
platformTour.s3_desc: Watch To Earn kampanya sistemini güçlendirir. Aktif üyeler günlük video izler. Günlük check-in'iniz.
platformTour.s3_tip3: Yüksek seviyeler = daha fazla izleme ve büyük bonuslar
platformTour.s3_tip5: Kaçırılan kota Kampanya çekimlerini duraklatır (Ortaklık değil)
platformTour.s4_desc: Her üye herhangi bir iş için güçlü araçlara erişir — içerik oluşturun, pazarlamayı izleyin, AI kreatifler üretin.
platformTour.s4_tip1: LinkHub — kişisel link-in-bio sayfanız (Linktree gibi). Fotoğraf, biyografi, sosyal linkler, butonlar. Tek link
platformTour.s4_tip2: Link Tools — tıklamaları izleyin, rotatörler oluşturun, QR üretin, analiz görün
platformTour.s4_tip3: Content Creator — paylaşımlar, altyazılar, hashtagler ve reklam metinleri için AI yazma aracı
platformTour.s4_tip4: Creative Studio — tam AI paketi: Video (9 model), Görseller (11), Müzik (Suno AI), Seslendirme (32 ses), Lip Sync, Galeri ve Krediler
platformTour.s5_desc: Pro'ya yükseltin ($35/ay): açılış sayfaları, sunumlar, otomatik e-postalar, AI satış hattı. Daha yüksek komisyonlar ($17,50 vs $10).
platformTour.s5_tip1: SuperPages — 24 blok, gradyan, duyarlı önizleme ve 8 şablonla sürükle-bırak oluşturucu
platformTour.s5_tip2: SuperDeck — şekiller, metin, görseller ve özel stil ile AI sunumlar
platformTour.s5_tip3: AutoResponder (MyLeads) — 5.000 potansiyel CRM, Brevo otomatik e-postalar ve Pay It Forward
platformTour.s5_tip4: SuperSeller — AI Otopilot: açılış sayfası, 30 paylaşım, 5 e-posta, 3 video senaryosu, reklamlar ve strateji
platformTour.s6_desc: İki cüzdan: Ortaklık (koşulsuz çekim) ve Kampanya (aktif seviye + kota gerekir). Pay It Forward üyelik hediye eder.
platformTour.s6_tip2: Kampanya Cüzdanı — aktif seviye + kota gerekir
platformTour.s6_tip4: Kripto Rehberi ile MetaMask veya Coinbase Wallet kurun (Hesap altında)
platformTour.s6_tip5: Pay It Forward — birine $20 Basic üyelik hediye edin. Onların sponsoru olursunuz ve komisyon kazanırsınız. $20+ kazandıklarında onlar da birine hediye eder — viral büyüme zinciri.

incomeDisclaimer.pleaseRead: Please read this disclaimer carefully before participating in any SuperAdPro income programme.
incomeDisclaimer.noGuaranteeText: SuperAdPro does not guarantee any level of income or earnings.
incomeDisclaimer.effortDependent: Your earnings depend entirely on your own efforts, skills, dedication, market conditions, and external factors.
incomeDisclaimer.creditPackAlloc: When you purchase a Credit Pack, the funds are allocated as follows:
incomeDisclaimer.creditPackNote: Credit packs provide genuine AI credits used in the Creative Studio.
incomeDisclaimer.campaignTierAlloc: When you purchase a Campaign Tier, the funds are allocated as follows:
incomeDisclaimer.membershipAlloc: When a member pays their monthly or annual membership fee:
incomeDisclaimer.commissionNotice: Commission rates may be adjusted by SuperAdPro at any time with reasonable notice.
incomeDisclaimer.pageSubtitle: SuperAdPro ile kazanma hakkında önemli bilgiler
incomeDisclaimer.body_L47: Campaign Tiers activate your participation in the 8×8 Income Grid and unlock daily video campaign views. Your tier purchase delivers real advertising views to campaign holders on the platform.
incomeDisclaimer.body_L59: SuperAdPro offers four income streams: Membership Referrals (50% commission), Campaign Grid (40% direct + 6.25% uni-level + 5% completion), Profit Nexus (15% direct + 10% auto-place + 10% completion), and Course Academy (coming soon). All commission rates are clearly disclosed on the Compensation Plan page.
incomeDisclaimer.body_L64: SuperAdPro operates a dual wallet system. Your Affiliate Wallet holds membership and Profit Nexus commissions and can be withdrawn at any time. Your Campaign Wallet holds grid commissions and requires an active Campaign Tier and completion of daily watch quotas to access. This structure ensures the platform's advertising ecosystem remains active and sustainable.
incomeDisclaimer.body_L68: Participation in SuperAdPro's compensation plan does not create an employer-employee relationship. Members are independent participants and are solely responsible for their own tax obligations, business expenses, and compliance with local laws and regulations.
incomeDisclaimer.body_L72: As with any business opportunity, there is risk involved. You should not invest more than you can afford to lose. Do not rely on income from SuperAdPro as your sole source of income. We encourage all members to treat this as a supplementary income opportunity and to make informed decisions based on their own financial circumstances.
incomeDisclaimer.body_L76: SuperAdPro is committed to ethical business practices. Members must not make misleading income claims when promoting the platform. Any income projections shared must be accompanied by a clear disclaimer that results are not typical and individual results will vary.
incomeDisclaimer.body_L80: Last updated: April 2026. This disclaimer applies to all income programmes operated by SuperAdPro.

publicPages.faqSubtitle: Katılmadan önce bilmeniz gereken her şey.
publicPages.refundPolicy: Tüm satışlar kesin ve iade edilemez.
publicPages.incomeDisclaimer: Income examples shown on this platform are illustrative only. Individual results vary.
publicPages.termsContent1: By using SuperAdPro, you agree to these terms. SuperAdPro is a video advertising and affiliate marketing platform. Members earn commissions by referring others and participating in campaign grids.
publicPages.earningsDisclaimerContent: Participation in the platform involves financial risk and should be treated as a business venture. Past performance of other members is not indicative of your own results.
publicPages.membershipCommContent: Members earn 50% commission when a referred member activates a membership. However, commissions are capped at the referring member's own tier level. A Basic member ($20/mo) earns a maximum of $10 per referral, regardless of the product purchased. A Pro member ($35/mo) earns up to $17.50 per referral. This applies to both initial signups and monthly renewals.
publicPages.upgradePolicyContent: Members upgrading from Basic to Pro pay only the $15 difference between tiers. The upgrade fee goes 100% to the platform and does not generate a commission for the referring sponsor. From the next billing cycle onwards, the member renews at the Pro rate ($35/mo) and the sponsor earns their tier-capped commission on each renewal.
publicPages.campaignTierCommContent: Campaign tier purchases are split as follows: 40% to the direct sponsor, 50% distributed across 8 uni-level tiers (6.25% each), 5% to the grid completion bonus pool, and 5% to the platform. Commission qualification requires an active membership and completion of daily Watch to Earn requirements.
publicPages.campaignViewTargets: Kampanya görüntüleme hedefleri ve yeniden satın alma
publicPages.campaignViewContent: Each campaign tier includes a set number of video views delivered by the Watch & Earn community. Once the view target has been achieved, the campaign completes. Members may repurchase the same tier to reactivate their commission qualification and submit a new video ad. Grids reactivate automatically upon completion — when a grid reaches 64 members, the completion bonus is paid and a new grid opens. This creates a long-term recurring income opportunity through ongoing repurchase and grid reactivation.
publicPages.courseCommContent: Course sales follow a 100% pass-up system. Sales 1, 3, 5, and 7 are kept by the seller. Sales 2, 4, 6, and 8 pass up to the sponsor in the commission chain.
publicPages.platformRightsContent: SuperAdPro reserves the right to modify, adjust, or update the following at any time, with or without prior notice, in order to maintain the integrity, fairness, and sustainability of the platform:
publicPages.rightsViewTargets: Campaign view targets — the number of views required per campaign tier may be adjusted based on community size and ad-delivery capacity.
publicPages.rightsCommRates: Commission rates and structures — including but not limited to referral percentages, grid commission splits, pass-up patterns, and qualification requirements.
publicPages.rightsMembership: Membership pricing and tier features — including the addition, removal, or modification of platform tools and capabilities included in each tier.
publicPages.rightsPolicies: Platform policies and operational rules — including but not limited to acceptable use policies, withdrawal thresholds, KYC requirements, and content moderation standards.
publicPages.rightsNotice: Any significant changes to commission structures or campaign view targets will be communicated via email and platform notification at least 7 days in advance.
publicPages.privacyContent1: We collect the minimum data necessary to operate the platform - your name, email, and payment information. We use Brevo for email and Cloudflare for security.
publicPages.privacyContent2: We do not sell your data to third parties. We use industry-standard encryption for all sensitive data including KYC documents.
publicPages.acceptableUseContent: Members may not use SuperAdPro to promote illegal products or services, distribute malware, harvest user data, or engage in deceptive marketing practices. Violation may result in account termination.
publicPages.cryptoPaymentsContent: All earnings are paid in USDT on the Polygon blockchain. Cryptocurrency transactions are irreversible. SuperAdPro is not responsible for losses due to incorrect wallet addresses or network errors.
publicPages.kycIntro: SuperAdPro is required to verify the identity of members before processing withdrawals. This helps prevent fraud, comply with international anti-money laundering regulations, and protect the community.
publicPages.kycDocuments: Full legal name, date of birth, and a government-issued photo ID - passport, driving licence, or national ID card.
publicPages.kycUseContent: Your documents are used solely to verify your identity and comply with regulatory requirements. They are never shared with other members or third parties.
publicPages.kycStoreContent: Documents are encrypted and stored securely in Cloudflare R2 object storage. Access is restricted to authorised administrators only.
publicPages.kycRightsContent: You have the right to request access to your personal data, request corrections, or request deletion of your KYC documents at any time by contacting support.
publicPages.kycProcessingContent: KYC applications are typically reviewed within 24-48 hours. You will be notified via email once your verification is approved or if additional documents are required.
publicPages.amlContent1: SuperAdPro is committed to preventing money laundering and the financing of terrorism. We implement appropriate controls to detect and report suspicious activity.
publicPages.amlContent2: We monitor transactions for suspicious activity and reserve the right to freeze accounts, refuse withdrawals, and report suspicious activity to relevant authorities.
publicPages.amlContent3: Members are prohibited from using SuperAdPro to launder funds, obscure the origins of funds, or conduct transactions on behalf of sanctioned individuals or entities.
publicPages.readyToAdvertiseDesc: Ücretsiz bir hesap oluşturun ve ilk kampanyanızı bugün başlatın.
publicPages.faqA1: Yes — registering is completely free. You pay for membership ($20/mo Basic or $35/mo Pro) to activate your earning ability and access the platform features.
publicPages.faqA2: Commissions are credited to your platform wallet instantly when they're earned. You can withdraw to your crypto wallet at any time, subject to a minimum withdrawal threshold.
publicPages.faqQ3: Basic ve Pro arasındaki fark nedir?
publicPages.faqA3: Basic ($20/mo) gives you full affiliate earnings, campaign grid access, and your affiliate link. Pro ($35/mo) adds SuperPages builder, SuperLeads CRM, email autoresponder, lead analytics, and AI content tools.
publicPages.faqQ4: Kazanmak için insanları işe almam gerekiyor mu?
publicPages.faqA4: Not exclusively. While referring others accelerates income through membership commissions, you also earn grid completion bonuses driven by your whole team's activity — not just people you personally recruited.
publicPages.faqA5: Each campaign tier has an 8×8 grid with 64 positions. As members across your network join that tier, positions fill. When all 64 fill, a completion bonus is triggered and paid to the grid owner. A single campaign can complete multiple times.
publicPages.faqA6: When anyone in your network (up to 8 levels deep) makes a grid purchase, you earn 6.25% of that purchase automatically. This means a large team generates passive income for you without any additional effort.
publicPages.faqA7: All earnings are in USDT (a dollar-pegged stablecoin) paid on the Base blockchain. You need a compatible crypto wallet to receive withdrawals.
publicPages.faqA8: When you sell a course, you earn a direct commission. Every 3rd sale passes up to your sponsor — who earns a larger commission. This creates a powerful incentive chain.
publicPages.faqQ9: Üyelik için taahhüt süresi var mı?
publicPages.faqA9: No. Membership is billed monthly with no contract. You can cancel at any time, though your earnings will stop when membership lapses.
publicPages.faqA10: Members can access support through the platform's help system. You can also reach us through the contact page.
publicPages.reachAudience: Etkileşimli bir video izleyici kitlesine ulaşın
publicPages.advertiserDesc: SuperAdPro members watch videos as part of earning campaigns. Your ads get genuine attention from motivated viewers.
publicPages.genuineViewsDesc: Members are incentivised to watch fully — no bots, no skipping, no fake engagement.
publicPages.motivatedAudienceDesc: Our members are entrepreneurs and business-minded individuals — a high-quality demographic.
publicPages.transparentReportingDesc: Track your views, engagement, and campaign performance in real time.
publicPages.costEffectiveDesc: Competitive CPM rates with guaranteed view delivery across our member network.
publicPages.recurringExposureDesc: Members return daily to watch campaigns — your brand gets repeated exposure.
publicPages.fastSetupDesc: Submit your video, set your budget, and go live within 24 hours.
publicPages.contactQuestion: Yasal şartlarımızla ilgili sorularınız mı var?
